skillsManifest.notes: Every skill manifest id must map to at least one provider.

dependencyProjectRegistry.notes: Every dependency project id must map to at least one provider; this does not imply execution eligibility.

runtimeCapabilityMatrix.notes: Every formal runtime projection must have a runtime_native provider.

weaponRegistry.notes: Every weapon id must map to a provider or provider group with a verification command.
